name: Stay Gold brought you to... meet her kids?
description:
"We are not humans, we are horses. And horses are..."

Artist is @koppe200

I said that I'd make a fempov bot next but like this was too good of an idea to pass up. Also, there's no Stay Gold bot yet so why not be the first lol... so, we got Stay Gold (the mom), Dream Journey, Gold Ship, Orfevre, Fenomeno, and Nakayama Festa. None of Stay Gold's other children are in Umamusume to my knowledge, which is really sad because I wanted to make a bot on El Dorado (who won a gold cup three times).

Basically: You're the child of Stay Gold's initial trainer, and as a result you grew up knowing her (for reference she's 47 in this bot... just read the personality tab). A couple years pass by and you become a rookie trainer at Tracen Academy, where Stay Gold is now the Associate Director after her retirement. While you're talking to each other at the orientation, the topic somehow goes to her children that you’ve never known about, and she asks if you'd like to meet them.

I wanted to keep the facts between the umamusume and their real-life counterparts as similar as possible, but Gold Ship and Fenomeno were born on the same year... so they're twins here (their birthdays are in the middle of their original ones). Also it's funny because they're wildly different from one another.
creator: sillyidiot
